div.h3: SWIM Protocol Verification — Gossip Protocol M5

div.p: Injection Method go harness.Partition([0,1,2], [3,4,5]) // SimulatedTransport drops cross-group
Injection Method go harness.SetPacketLoss(0.05) // 5% // Drops packets by probability
Injection Method go transport.delay = 200 * time.MS // Sleep before delivery
